description: Detect current workflow phase and recommend next step.
Facilitate ideation and produce a design document.
Create detailed implementation plan with TDD steps.
Execute implementation plan task-by-task with TDD discipline; choose inline or subagent-driven mode.
Execute plan using subagent-driven development — fresh subagent per task with review between tasks.
Implement feature or bugfix with strict TDD discipline: RED-GREEN-REFACTOR.
Systematically identify and fix bugs using hypothesis-driven approach.
Request and receive code review — two-stage: spec compliance then code quality.
Process review feedback and address all issues.
Verify all requirements are implemented and tested before shipping.
Complete development branch with commit cleanup PR creation and worktree cleanup.
Create or manage git worktrees for isolated parallel development.
